summaryAm: ትንሽ ልጅ የሚያበስል ማሰሮ ሲያገኝ መስማትን እና ማጋራትን የሚማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: አስተምሮ መስማት እና ቃልን በጥንቃቄ መጠቀም ቤትን ያስደስታል።

source.name: Public-domain classic
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ትንሽ ልጅ ከደግ አያት ትንሽ ማሰሮ ተቀበለች።
pages.textEn: A little girl received a small pot from a kind grandmother.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 1: ትንሽ ልጅ ከደግ አያት ትንሽ ማሰሮ ተቀበለች።

pages.textAm: “በደግ ቃል ገንፎ ይበስላል፣ በደግ ቃልም ይቆማል” አለቻት አያቷ።
pages.textEn: Grandmother said kind words would make porridge start and stop.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 2: “በደግ ቃል ገንፎ ይበስላል፣ በደግ ቃልም ይቆማል” አለቻት አያቷ።

pages.textAm: ልጅቷ ቃሉን አለች፣ ሞቃት ገንፎም በማሰሮው ተሞላ።
pages.textEn: The girl said the words, and warm porridge filled the pot.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 3: ልጅቷ ቃሉን አለች፣ ሞቃት ገንፎም በማሰሮው ተሞላ።

pages.textEn: The family shared the porridge with neighbors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 4: ቤተሰቡ ገንፎውን ከጎረቤቶች ጋር አጋራ።

pages.textAm: አንድ ጊዜ ሰው የማቆሚያውን ቃል ረሳ፣ ገንፎውም ትንሽ ብዙ ሆነ።
pages.textEn: Once someone forgot the stopping words, and there was a little too much porridge.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 5: አንድ ጊዜ ሰው የማቆሚያውን ቃል ረሳ፣ ገንፎውም ትንሽ ብዙ ሆነ።

pages.textAm: ልጅቷ በቀስታ ቃሉን አስታወሰች፣ ሁሉም ማዳመጥ እንደሚያስፈልግ ተማሩ።
pages.textEn: The girl calmly remembered the words, and everyone learned to listen carefully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 6: ልጅቷ በቀስታ ቃሉን አስታወሰች፣ ሁሉም ማዳመጥ እንደሚያስፈልግ ተማሩ።

pages.textAm: ልጅቷ ቃላቱን በትንሽ ወረቀት ላይ ሳለች። አያቷም “አስፈላጊ ቃል በጥንቃቄ ይጠበቃል” አለቻት።
pages.textEn: The girl drew the words on a little paper so she could remember them.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little girl drawing reminder words beside a small porridge pot.

pages.textAm: ገንፎው ሲበስል ቤቱ በሞቃት ሽታ ተሞላ። ልጅቷ መጀመሪያ ለአያቷ ትንሽ ሳህን አቀረበች።
pages.textEn: When the porridge cooked, she served her grandmother first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little girl serving a small bowl of porridge to grandmother.

pages.textAm: ጎረቤቶች ሲመጡ ሁሉም ለማጋራት ሳህን አመጡ። ማሰሮውም ለሁሉም በቂ ሞቃት ገንፎ ሰጠ።
pages.textEn: Neighbors brought bowls, and the pot made enough warm porridge for all.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Neighbors with bowls sharing warm porridge around a small pot.

pages.textAm: በተረሳው ቀን ገንፎው ከማሰሮው በላይ በቀስታ ወጣ። ሰዎቹ አልተጨነቁም፤ ልጅቷን ጠሩ።
pages.textEn: When the words were forgotten, the porridge rose gently and everyone called the girl.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Porridge gently rising from a pot while family calls for the little girl.

pages.textAm: ልጅቷ የማቆሚያውን ቃል በጸጥታ አለች። ገንፎው ቆመ፣ ሁሉም ቃልን መስማት እና ማስታወስ እንደሚጠቅም ተማሩ።
pages.textEn: The girl calmly said the stopping words, and everyone learned to listen and remember.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little girl calmly stopping a magic porridge pot while everyone smiles.
